intent: Mac Dev Agent - We are not going to build the forge platform, we are going to build a highly sophisticated mac native AI consensus development agent. Read all the documents in the doc store to start the cycle.
scope_statement:
Build a macOS-native AI consensus development agent — a professional SwiftUI desktop application that orchestrates autonomous software development through a consensus engine (TRD-2), multi-agent coordination protocol with a GitHub-stored Build Ledger (TRD-4), integrated build pipeline (TRD-3), GitHub integration (TRD-5), holistic code review (TRD-6), TRD-driven development workflow (TRD-7), a pixel-level SwiftUI design system (TRD-8), self-hosted Mac CI runner infrastructure (TRD-9), and a document store (TRD-10), all secured under a defined threat model (TRD-11) with a backend runtime startup sequence (TRD-12). This is NOT the Forge enterprise platform — it is a standalone macOS application shell (TRD-1) that enables multiple engineers running separate instances to build against the same repository without collision, with the consensus engine providing AI-driven decision orchestration while explicitly deferring review cycles to TRD-3, GitHub operations to TRD-5, and build state persistence to the Build Pipeline's ThreadStateStore (TRD-2, §2.2).

Clarifications:
  - Ignore the context document references and work directly from the documents in the local doc store.
  - Review the remaining documents they provide the context

prd_plan.title: Backend Runtime Startup and Service Orchestration
Document Store Access and Context Management
Consensus Engine Integration and Decision Orchestration
Multi-Agent Coordination and Build Ledger Collaboration
Mac CI Runner Connectivity and Local Build Environment Integration
Human Oversight, Intervention, and Recovery UX
